title: General Benchmark Result Submission
description: Standard schema for registering general agent benchmark result submissions on the Gaia Skill Tree platform.

benchmark.description: Name of the benchmark suite (e.g. GAIA, SWE-bench, HumanEval, WebArena).

version.description: Version of the benchmark suite or configuration used.

name.description: Name or identifier of the evaluated model.

revision.description: Commit SHA or version descriptor of the model weights/parameters.

provider.description: The provider/creator of the model (e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic, Meta).

name.description: Name of the primary metric (e.g. accuracy, pass@1).

value.description: The value of the primary metric.

seeds.description: List of random seeds used for the runs.

containerSha.description: Docker container or OCI image SHA.

envHash.description: Cryptographic hash of the environment specification (e.g. lockfile SHA).
